title: GlassWorld
description: This is a fabric mod. It adds some fantastic types of glass. Enjoy!
body:
# Be cautious! Beta versions may contain untested issues.

## GlassWorld

### Fabric Edition （If you are a **FORGE 1.20.1** user, congratulations! You **have a chance to use this mod**. For details, please view the last paragraph)

This adds many fantasty materials like **Diamond Glass** and the netherite-enhanced **Ancient Glass**, the redstone-powered **Redstone Glass**. They can be used to make armors, tools and weapons(*in development*). They have extraordinary durabilities and damage or protection in that the mod is suitable for playing other difficult mods (cataclysm, for instance)

**JEI** or similar mods can be a great choice for viewing recipes.

## To Forge users

The mod do not hava an forge edition.
But if you are using **Forge Minecraft 1.20.1**, you may try [**Sinytra Connector**](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector). (**Version: *1.4.0-1 Beta* or later**)
